languages.text: Слухи о любви Вольного Торговца к аугментациям тела расползлись далеко по Простору Коронус. Священные целительные машины, установленные на корабле, позволили многим приближенным Лорд-капитана продолжить свою службу на благо протектората, как по их желанию, так и без него.

Rumours of the Rogue Trader's love of physical augmentations spread far and wide across the Koronus Expanse. The sacred healing machines installed on the ship allowed many of the Lord Captain's entourage to continue their service to the protectorate, either willingly or unwillingly.
languages.original_text: Слухи о любви Вольного Торговца к аугментациям тела расползлись далеко по Простору Коронус. Священные целительные машины, установленные на корабле, позволили многим приближенным Лорд-капитана продолжить свою службу на благо протектората, как по их желанию, так и без него.

traits.locale_text: Rumours of the Rogue Trader's love of physical augmentations spread far and wide across the Koronus Expanse. The sacred healing machines installed on the ship allowed many of the Lord Captain's entourage to continue their service to the protectorate, either willingly or unwillingly.

Rumours of the Rogue Trader's love of physical augmentations spread far and wide across the Koronus Expanse. The sacred healing machines installed on the ship allowed many of the Lord Captain's entourage to continue their service to the protectorate, either willingly or unwillingly.

Rumours of the Rogue Trader's love of physical augmentations spread far and wide across the Koronus Expanse. The sacred healing machines installed on the ship allowed many of the Lord Captain's entourage to continue their service to the protectorate, either willingly or unwillingly.

languages.text: ローグ・トレーダーが身体改造を好むという噂は、コロヌス・エクスパンス中に広く知れ渡った。艦に設置された神聖なる癒やしの機械のおかげで、ロード・キャプテンの側近の多くは、自らの意志で、あるいは否応なく、保護領への奉仕を続けることができたのだった。
languages.original_text: Rumours of the Rogue Trader's love of physical augmentations spread far and wide across the Koronus Expanse. The sacred healing machines installed on the ship allowed many of the Lord Captain's entourage to continue their service to the protectorate, either willingly or unwillingly.

traits.locale_text: 「悪徳トレーダー」の身体改造への愛好は、コロナス・エクスパンションに広まった。船に設置された聖なる癒しの機械は、多くの「守護者」の側近が、自発的にも強制的にも、守護者への奉仕を続けることを可能にした。
ローグ・トレーダーが身体改造を好むという噂は、コロヌス・エクスパンス中に広く知れ渡った。艦に設置された神聖なる癒やしの機械のおかげで、ロード・キャプテンの側近の多くは、自らの意志で、あるいは否応なく、保護領への奉仕を続けることができたのだった。

languages.text: 关于行商浪人热衷躯体改造的传言在科罗努斯扩区广为流传。舰上安装的神圣医疗机械让舰长大人的众多随从得以继续为王朝属地效力，无论他们愿意与否。
languages.original_text: Rumours of the Rogue Trader's love of physical augmentations spread far and wide across the Koronus Expanse. The sacred healing machines installed on the ship allowed many of the Lord Captain's entourage to continue their service to the protectorate, either willingly or unwillingly.

traits.locale_text: 关于行商浪人热衷躯体改造的传言在科罗努斯扩区广为流传。舰上安装的神圣医疗机械让舰长大人的众多随从得以继续为王朝属地效力，无论他们愿意与否。

languages.text: L'amour {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} pour les augmentations physiques fit l'objet de rumeurs qui se répandirent aux quatre coins des Étendues de Koronus. Les machines sacrées de soins installées à bord du vaisseau permirent à de nombreux membres de l'entourage {mf|du seigneur-capitaine|de la seigneure-capitaine} de continuer leur service pour le protectorat, de plein gré ou non.
languages.original_text: Rumours of the Rogue Trader's love of physical augmentations spread far and wide across the Koronus Expanse. The sacred healing machines installed on the ship allowed many of the Lord Captain's entourage to continue their service to the protectorate, either willingly or unwillingly.

traits.locale_text: L'amour {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} pour les augmentations physiques fit l'objet de rumeurs qui se répandirent aux quatre coins des Étendues de Koronus. Les machines sacrées de soins installées à bord du vaisseau permirent à de nombreux membres de l'entourage {mf|du seigneur-capitaine|de la seigneure-capitaine} de continuer leur service pour le protectorat, de plein gré ou non.

languages.text: Los rumores de la pasión de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente por los aumentos físicos llegaron a todos los planetas de la Extensión de Koronus. Las máquinas de curación sagradas de la nave permitieron a muchos miembros del séquito de{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán continuar con su servicio al protectorado, ya fuera por voluntad propia o no.
languages.original_text: Rumours of the Rogue Trader's love of physical augmentations spread far and wide across the Koronus Expanse. The sacred healing machines installed on the ship allowed many of the Lord Captain's entourage to continue their service to the protectorate, either willingly or unwillingly.

traits.locale_text: Los rumores de la pasión de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente por los aumentos físicos llegaron a todos los planetas de la Extensión de Koronus. Las máquinas de curación sagradas de la nave permitieron a muchos miembros del séquito de{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán continuar con su servicio al protectorado, ya fuera por voluntad propia o no.

languages.text: Hür Tacir'in fiziksel ogmentasyonlara olan sevgisine dair söylentiler, Koronus Enginliği'nin dört bir yanına yayıldı. Gemiye kurulan kutsal iyileştirme makineleri, Lord Kaptan'ın maiyetindekilerin protektoraya hizmetlerini gönüllü veya gönülsüz olarak sürdürmelerine olanak sağladı.
languages.original_text: Rumours of the Rogue Trader's love of physical augmentations spread far and wide across the Koronus Expanse. The sacred healing machines installed on the ship allowed many of the Lord Captain's entourage to continue their service to the protectorate, either willingly or unwillingly.

traits.locale_text: Hür Tacir'in fiziksel ogmentasyonlara olan sevgisine dair söylentiler, Koronus Enginliği'nin dört bir yanına yayıldı. Gemiye kurulan kutsal iyileştirme makineleri, Lord Kaptan'ın maiyetindekilerin protektoraya hizmetlerini gönüllü veya gönülsüz olarak sürdürmelerine olanak sağladı.

languages.text: Gerüchte über die Begeisterung {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} für physische Augmentationen breiteten sich in der gesamten Koronus-Ausdehnung aus. Dank der auf dem Schiff installierten heiligen Heilungsmaschinen konnte ein Großteil des Gefolges des Lord Captains seinen Dienst für das Protektorat aus freien Stücken oder widerwillig fortsetzen.
languages.original_text: Rumours of the Rogue Trader's love of physical augmentations spread far and wide across the Koronus Expanse. The sacred healing machines installed on the ship allowed many of the Lord Captain's entourage to continue their service to the protectorate, either willingly or unwillingly.

Dank der auf dem Schiff installierten heiligen Heilungsmaschinen konnte ein Großteil des Gefolges des Lord Captains seinen Dienst für das Protektorat aus freien Stücken oder widerwillig fortsetzen.
